programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: South Pacific
programme.desc: Suspicious pandas; a man courts trouble; a woman has unusual plans.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: South Pacific
programme.desc: A supposed fisherman; a cooler packed with cocaine; a suspicious package.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: South Pacific
programme.desc: A suspicious stuffed toy is looking for the wrong kind of fun in Auckland.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: South Pacific
programme.desc: Something fishy is found in customs when a package from Africa is searched.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: South Pacific
programme.desc: A half million dollars of meth is buttoned up nicely at Auckland.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: South Pacific
programme.desc: An irritated passenger's attitude gets him a return flight to the UK.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Colombia
programme.desc: After being arrested with cocaine in his suitcase, a man accuses his son-in-law of tricking him; two individuals posing as a couple of young tourists turn out to be complete strangers carrying cocaine capsules inside their bodies.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Colombia
programme.desc: Security officers in Colombia's largest airport keep criminals out.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Colombia
programme.desc: Security officers in Colombia's largest airport find smuggled cocaine in cans of deodorant.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Colombia
programme.desc: Officials at Colombia's largest airport must put a stop to smugglers moving drugs in laptops.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Colombia
programme.desc: After an inspection reveals that a pair of innocent-looking high heels are more than they seem, the passenger carrying them claims he was doing someone a favor without realizing what they were.

programme.desc: Marine agents intercept a boat carrying over 500 kilos of cocaine.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: CBP uncovers smuggled human remains; Border Patrol stops migrant smugglers.

programme.title: Inside the American Mob
programme.desc: It is 1978, and American law enforcement is at war with the American mob; the FBI has a secret weapon in agent Joe Pistone, AKA Donnie Brasco, who has infiltrated the Bonanno family.

programme.title: Inside the American Mob
programme.desc: In 1980, one of the most successful mob families in America is in Philadelphia, but when old school don Angelo Bruno is assassinated, a bloody new era begins.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Stand
programme.desc: After breaking through, an American regiment is surrounded by Nazi forces; cut off from food, reinforcements and medical care, the saga of the Lost Battalion begins.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Stand
programme.desc: Allied generals jostle for the honor to be the first to cross the Rhine River; Adolf Hitler has ordered that no bridge is to fall into Allied hands; so when an opportunity arises, a race is on to capture a bridge -- and change the course of the war.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hitler's Last Stand
programme.desc: Calgary Highlanders launch a diversionary attack against the Walcheren Causeway; with the Germans distracted, Allied Commandos carry out an amphibious assault on Walcheren Island, the final Nazi stronghold guarding the port.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hitler's Last Stand
programme.desc: U.S. forces fight to the death against Adolf Hitler's massive surprise offensive to slow the Nazi advance allowing for the legendary defense of Bastogne, Belgium.
